name.description: Short display name shown in cards and headings (e.g. "Horse Boarding")

slug.description: Internal link path (e.g. "/boarding"). Used by ServiceCard CTA.

description.description: 1–2 sentences used on cards and meta description (max ~180 chars).

long_description.description: Rich body copy rendered on the service's dedicated page.

icon_path.description: The SVG path data string for the card icon. Paste only the value of the 'd' attribute from a 24×24 icon.

cta_text.description: Label for the 'Learn More' link on the ServiceCard.

cta_href.description: Destination URL for the card CTA (e.g. "/boarding").

featured_image.description: Hero image used on the service's dedicated page.

order.description: Lower numbers appear first in the Services Grid (0 = first).
